Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 iv 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare encounter records file. The guide 
includes several ways for users to quickly find the information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable names 
• Individual entries for each variable contain
